svg.title: LithePG v1.0 app icon PNG IEND release gate evidence
svg.desc: Evidence summary for the release-helper hardening slice that requires high-resolution PNG-backed ICNS icon payloads to include a terminal IEND chunk.
svg.text: Slice: require PNG IEND chunk inside high-resolution ICNS icon payloads
